summary: I'm Jamie—a curious, people-loving (97% extrovert!) Learning & Development professional who thrives on solving problems through data analysis, developing programs grounded in evidence, and collaborating with stakeholders for sustainable impact. Expect me to always be seeking ways we can improve people experience—through human-centered, data-driven approaches.

bullets.text: Develop and maintain {prog|training materials, SOPs, and a self-service knowledge base} for 70+ {cross|cross-functional} staff, reducing onboarding time by 75%
Facilitate {prog|training webinars} for 600+ participants using live sessions and video production, achieving a 78% program enrollment rate
Conduct needs assessments with 25+ {cross|global stakeholders} to {data|analyze feedback} and design 3 new learning programs aligned with organizational goals
Lead {coord|end-to-end program management} across 20+ concurrent initiatives—coordinating vendors, tracking {data|completion metrics}, and optimizing delivery via {ex|continuous improvement}
Facilitate CEO/HR discovery interviews to diagnose absenteeism, then {data|analyze} 300+ leave cases—surfacing $362K in costs that drove policy redesigns
Conduct focus groups and 1:1 interviews with an NGO leadership team to surface decision-making gaps and recommend {ex|process} changes
Analyzed 2,000+ {data|employee survey responses} to surface satisfaction and engagement drivers for C-suite decision-making
Led a manager-effectiveness initiative, transforming {data|feedback data} into actionable reports that informed training and engagement strategies
Delivered internal presentations on DEI, Inclusive Leadership, and performance review to senior leadership
Enhanced employee experience through {ex|5 cross-functional projects} on survey development, rewards & recognition, and {prog|L&D program design}
Initiated a DEI pilot with an Inclusive Leadership {prog|workshop} for 12 senior leaders, later expanded to 23 other global locations
Optimized {ex|onboarding processes} across 3 global locations via process analysis and clarifying job responsibilities
Supported organizational change by directing a Mergers & Acquisitions project, coordinating {cross|cross-functional stakeholders}
Assisted in employee relations cases, ensuring compliance with local labor laws and confidentiality
Developed proficiency across HR functions including recruitment, compensation, and performance management
Drafted job descriptions, posted openings, and researched global compensation across international markets
Engaged global talent via personalized communication, increasing applications by 566% in 2 months
Organized campus recruiting events and moderated panels with C-suite executives at top universities
